title: Spark108 Russian Language
description: The texture pack contains Russian language for some mods.
body:
[![MIT License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/LambdAurora/LambDynamicLights?style=flat-square)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spark108/minecraft-mods-russian/main/License)
![Texture](https://img.shields.io/badge/features-TEXTURE-brightgreen)
![Texture](https://img.shields.io/badge/client-1.19.3-brightgreen)
![Texture](https://img.shields.io/badge/client-1.19.4-brightgreen)

The texture pack contains Russian language for some mods.

You can help expand the translation for your favorite mods on GitHub!

You can also contribute translations for your language (this is highly welcome), but remember, this package is originally intended for a Russian-speaking audience.

## Installation
1. Download the archive with the texture pack.
2. Place the archive in your `.minecraft\resourcepacks` folder.
3. In the texture selection menu in the game, select the `Spark108 Russian Language` texture pack.

## List of modifications
- [Item Alchemy](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-alchemy)
- [Iron Chests](https://modrinth.com/mod/iron-chests-fabric)
- [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) - only for some phrases.
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
